workiqQueriesRun: Give me a comprehensive analysis of ALL my M365 activity from the past 7 days across email, meetings, Teams chats, and documents. For each source, list: the most frequent/recurring activities, estimated time spent, key participants (by role not name), and any repeating patterns or workflows. Include specific examples of recurring email types, meeting types, chat topics, and document types. Also identify cross-source workflows (e.g., email, meeting, document chains). Be thorough — I need at least 15 distinct activity patterns.
